title: phaius gratus
intro: Phaius gratus, also known as the Dove Orchid, is a type of orchid that is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phaius gratus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Phaius gratus is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote digestive health and boost the immune system.
